# NOTE: the cuFOLIO solver stack (cvxpy / clarabel / scs) is ENTERPRISE-ONLY (MLR-5 #1905)
# and lives in requirements.txt, NOT here. Portfolio optimization is not part of the OSS /
# Desktop / Docker editions — this keeps the ~24 MB solver payload out of the free bundle.
# Enforced by tests/unit/test_no_ecos_solver.py::test_cufolio_solver_stack_is_enterprise_only.
